if a standing trustee is serving in the case, the percentage fee fixed for such standing trustee.

if a standing trustee appointed under section 1202(c) of this title is serving in the case, the percentage fee fixed for such standing trustee under section 1202(d) of this title.11See References in Text note below.1

children.label: c
children.text: Except as otherwise provided in the plan or in the order confirming the plan, the trustee shall make payments to creditors under the plan.
